channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI just killed your last excuse for not starting a business
item.description: I'm offering you four specific ways to get more out of AI: better prompting , improving AI memory , starting a business using AI (tonight) and running...

item.title: Asian Americans report highest anxiety as U.S. debates identity and immigration
item.description: Asian Americans report higher levels of anxiety than any other racial group in the U.S., a new survey finds. Why it matters: As Washington hardens its...

item.title: Pentagon calls timeout on War Powers
item.description: Senate Republicans are calling on the Trump administration to clarify how it is interpreting the 60-day clock under the War Powers Act in its military...

item.title: Washington has a new Anthropic problem
item.description: Anthropic is both a risk and a necessity to AI progress, at least in the White House's telling. Why it matters: That tension is shaping AI policy in r...
